query:
INSERT INTO field_notes (userId, title, body, category, isPublic, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (
  1,
  'How to Add Living Nexus to Plex or Jellyfin',
  '**Living Nexus is now available as a media server channel.**

Every track on this platform carries a Witness ID — cryptographic proof of origin embedded directly in the file metadata. When you stream or download from Living Nexus through Plex or Jellyfin, that proof travels with the music.

---

## PLEX

1. Open Plex Media Server
2. Add a Music channel or custom source
3. Point to:
   `https://livingnexus.org/api/v1/plex/manifest`
4. Browse sovereign music directly in Plex

---

## JELLYFIN

1. Open Jellyfin dashboard
2. Add a catalog source
3. Point to:
   `https://livingnexus.org/api/v1/catalog`
4. All tracks with WID metadata load automatically

---

## What You Get

Every downloaded track includes the full Witness ID embedded in the file metadata — title, artist, cover art, ISRC, BPM, copyright year, and the Sovereign Shutter Doctrine fields.

The proof of origin travels with the music forever. No platform required.

**WID Verification:**
`https://livingnexus.org/verify/:witnessId`

---

*— Doc Seraph Mercer*
*Command Domains LLC · BDDT Publishing*
*Sovereign Shutter™ Framework — Genesis Day March 20, 2026*',
  'update',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
